ns0:entry.ns0:title: Adamant-im/adamant-im
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Adamant-im/adamant-im
Language: vue
ADAMANT Decentralized Messenger and Crypto Wallet. Progressive Web Application (PWA) for Web, Tor, Android, macOS, Windows, and Linux.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: AutomaApp/automa
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AutomaApp/automa
Language: vue
A browser extension for automating your browser by connecting blocks

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MetaCubeX/metacubexd
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MetaCubeX/metacubexd
Language: vue

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Virtual-Browser/VirtualBrowser
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Virtual-Browser/VirtualBrowser
Language: vue
Free anti fingerprint browser, 指纹浏览器, 隐私浏览器, 防识别浏览器, 反识别浏览器, 防关联浏览器, 免费的web3空投专用指纹浏览器 https://virtualbrowser.cc/?src=github

ns0:entry.ns0:title: crmeb/CRMEB
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/crmeb/CRMEB
Language: vue
🔥CRMEB开源商城免费开源多语言商城系统，Tp6框架商城，系统可商用；包含小程序商城、H5商城、公众号商城、PC商城、App，支持分销、拼团、砍价、秒杀、优惠券、积分、会员等级、小程序直播、页面DIY，前后端分离，方便二开，更有详细使用文档、接口文档、数据字典、二开文档/视频教程，欢迎大家提出宝贵意见和建议

ns0:entry.ns0:title: doocs/md
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/doocs/md
Language: vue
✍ WeChat Markdown Editor | 一款高度简洁的微信 Markdown 编辑器：支持 Markdown 语法、自定义主题样式、内容管理、多图床、AI 助手等特性

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pipipi-pikachu/PPTist
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pipipi-pikachu/PPTist
Language: vue
PowerPoint-ist（/'pauəpɔintist/）, An online presentation application that replicates most of the commonly used features of MS PowerPoint, allowing for the editing and presentation of PPT online. Support AIPPT.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ruxailab/RUXAILAB
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ruxailab/RUXAILAB
Language: vue
RUXAILAB - Usability Testing and Heuristics Evaluation Conceptual learning

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tiny-craft/tiny-rdm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tiny-craft/tiny-rdm
Language: vue
Tiny RDM (Tiny Redis Desktop Manager) - A modern, colorful, super lightweight Redis GUI client for Mac, Windows, and Linux. It also provides a web version that can be deployed via Docker.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: unovue/reka-ui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/unovue/reka-ui
Language: vue
An open-source UI component library for building high-quality, accessible design systems and web apps for Vue. Previously Radix Vue

ns0:entry.ns0:title: vbenjs/vue-vben-admin
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/vbenjs/vue-vben-admin
Language: vue
A modern vue admin panel built with Vue3, Shadcn UI, Vite, TypeScript, and Monorepo. It's fast!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: zxwk1998/vue-admin-better
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
